new_classes.label_en: Plum, Pear and Cherry Brandy in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22089038)
new_classes.label_de: Pflaumen-, Birnen- und Kirschwasser in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22089038)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage obtained exclusively by fermenting and distilling plum, pear or cherry musts (excluding liqueurs), presented in containers holding more than 2 litres, classified under CN code 2208 90 38 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) the product is a spirit obtained exclusively by fermenting and distilling plum, pear or cherry musts (modelled via hasFruitDistillationProcess someValuesFrom PrunePearCherryFermentationDistillation); (2) the container volume is more than 2 litres (modelled via decimalRange minExclusive 2 on maxContainerVolumeL); (3) the CN code is asserted via codeString hasValue '22089038'; (4) disjointness with the small-container sibling (CN 22089033) is expressed via complement. A minor gap remains: the legal text references the HS Explanatory Note to heading 0809 for the definitions of 'plums' and 'cherries', which introduces fruit-type specificity that is not formally modelled as a distinct property or class in this ontology. Additionally, the explicit exclusion of liqueurs is inherited from the parent class PrunePearCherryBrandy and not re-stated at this level.
